nodes.x: Verily, thus saith the Lord unto you concerning the Apocrypha—There are many things contained therein that are true, and it is mostly translated correctly;
1 Verily, thus saith the Lord unto you concerning the Apocrypha--There are many things contained therein that are true, and it is mostly translated correctly;

1. Verily, thus saith the Lord unto you concerning the Apocrypha,
 {332} there are many things contained therein that are true, and it
 is mostly translated correctly.

saw, which we were commanded to write while we were yet in the Spirit. 8 But great and marvellous are the works of the Lord and the mysteries of his kingdom which he showed unto us, which surpasses all understanding in glory, and in might, and in dominion, which he commanded us we should not write, while we were yet in the Spirit, and are not lawful for man to utter; neither is man capable to…
There are many things contained therein that are not true, which are interpolations by the hands of men.
Verily, I say unto you, that it is not needful that the Apocrypha should be translated.
Therefore, whoso readeth it, let him understand, for the Spirit manifesteth truth;

12 When you, therefore, shall see the abominations. of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, concerning. the destruction of Jerusaiem, then you shall. stand in the holy place. (Whoso readeth let him understand.) :
And whoso is enlightened by the Spirit shall obtain benefit therefrom;
And whoso receiveth not by the Spirit, cannot be benefited. Therefore it is not needful that it should be translated. Amen.

writings called the Apocrypha I received the following; 214 Revelation, 9 Mar. 1833 , in Doctrine and Covenants 92, 1835 ed. [D&C 91]. Revelation Given March 9 th . 1833. 1 Verily thus saith the Lord unto you, concerning the Apocrypha,[HC 1:331] there are many things contained therein that are true, and it is mostly translated correct: there are many things contained therein that are not…
